subcodes.first_line: O dearly cherished Bashir! Your letter was received and perused with the utmost attention, serving as evidence of its arrival [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیر عزیز من نامه شما وصول یافت و بدقت تمام ملاحظه گردید دلیل بر وصول نامه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause
